title: Amtech S0900 5 Piece Screw Extractor Set
features: DURABLE: This handy screw extractor set is made from drop forged, heat treated steel for durability
VERSATILE: Suitable for screw sizes between 3mm-14mm, it is supplied in a handy plastic storage case
LIGHTWEIGHT TOOL: Easy to carry and operate throughout the day
CLEAN RESULTS: Blades deliver smooth and accurate results
VERSATILE USE: Suitable for home, office, or workshop settings
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 5x Screw Extractor See more

specifications_table.Recommended Uses For Product: Assembling or disassembling furniture, woodworking projects, electrical work, machinery repair, general household maintenance tasks
